name: Zombie Escape
short_description: After a zombie apocalypse, you gather food and try to survive while aiming to achieve the highest score.
detailed_description:
Zombie Escape is an action-packed and thrilling survival game where you strive to stay alive after a zombie apocalypse. Players navigate a post-apocalyptic world, collecting food and resources while constantly facing life-threatening dangers. In this world full of zombies, you not only fight to survive but also aim to achieve the highest score possible.

With every step, you'll encounter challenges and obstacles, while ever-changing environmental conditions make survival even more difficult. In this game, it's not just about collecting resources, but also about thinking strategically and making quick decisions to avoid zombies and stay alive. Escaping zombie hordes and gathering food requires a strategic approach to ensure you last as long as possible.

Zombie Escape offers a unique experience with every playthrough. You'll face different levels and increasing difficulty, and with each new day, there are more dangers and opportunities. Amidst the zombie apocalypse, you'll feel like a true survival expert as you strive to reach the highest score.
